detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MILLIONAIRE.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#489-507):
	External calls:
	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#501)
		- _router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,deadAddress,block.timestamp) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#791-805)
		- _router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#771-783)
		- _router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(amount,0,path,marketingAddress,block.timestamp) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#721-733)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#501)
		- _router.addLiquidityETH{value: ethAmount}(address(this),tokenAmount,0,0,deadAddress,block.timestamp) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#791-805)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()] - amount) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#503)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (MILLIONAIRE.sol#815)
	MILLIONAIRE._allowances (MILLIONAIRE.sol#287) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MILLIONAIRE._approve(address,address,uint256) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#809-819)
	- MILLIONAIRE.allowance(address,address) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#441-445)
	- MILLIONAIRE.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (MILLIONAIRE.sol#489-507)
